title: Active Shooter / Riot Evasion
immediate_steps: RUN: Have an escape route in mind, leave belongings behind, keep hands visible
HIDE: If you can't run, hide out of view. Lock and barricade doors with heavy furniture. Silence your cell phone and remain perfectly quiet.
FIGHT: As an absolute last resort, act with physical aggression, throw items, and commit to your actions to incapacitate the shooter
avoid: Do not hide in groups (spread out)
Do not pull the fire alarm (it can force people into open hallways)
Do not argue with law enforcement (follow instructions immediately)
